suites.projectDesc: AI agents will plan, build, test, and deploy your app end-to-end.
suites.flowDesc: Design, copy, and structure — your site will be live in minutes.
suites.marketingDesc: AI will plan, create, and optimize your campaigns across channels.
suites.pentestDesc: AI will scan your systems, find vulnerabilities, and suggest fixes.
suites.searchDesc: R&D intelligence for entrepreneurs and product teams.
suites.projectDescLong: Build and deploy full applications from a prompt. AI agents plan, build, test, and ship your product end-to-end.
suites.flowDescLong: Launch high-converting websites and landing pages in minutes. Design, copy, structure, and hosting included.
suites.marketingDescLong: Plan, create, run, and optimize acquisition campaigns across channels. AI handles the execution.
suites.pentestDescLong: Detect vulnerabilities before they become costly. AI scans your apps and systems, delivers actionable fixes.
suites.searchDescLong: Discover market opportunities, analyze competitors, and validate ideas with AI-powered research.
suites.flowSmall: Websites and landing pages in minutes.

stack.subtitle: Kalit Execution Stack
stack.title: Full Stack Model Matrix
stack.description: Covering four major areas — apps, websites, growth, and security. Everything you need to build and scale a digital product end to end.

architecture.subtitle: The Architecture
architecture.title: Kalit is not
architecture.description: An execution layer that turns AI intelligence into structured workflows, deployed systems, and real business outcomes.

features.subtitle: How it works
features.title: Built to ship not just prototype
features.description: Go from idea to execution faster with AI workflows designed for real product, growth, and security work.
features.agents: Specialized AI agents coordinated as one team
features.agentsDesc: Each agent handles a role — planning, coding, design, testing, deployment. They coordinate so you don't have to.
features.references: Describe your project, add references and assets
features.referencesDesc: Share screenshots, describe what you need, and let the agents match your vision. No coding required.
features.parallelDesc: Build your app, generate your landing page, and prepare your launch in parallel — instead of waiting on one step at a time.
features.deploy: Go live with one click — hosting included
features.deployDesc: Publish landing pages, deploy apps, and launch campaigns directly from Kalit. No external tools needed.

join.subtitle: Get started
join.title: Start with the suite that matches your goal
join.description: Use one suite on its own or combine all four to build, launch, grow, and secure your business from one platform.

choose.subtitle: Compare
choose.description: Compare Kalit with other tools across the capabilities that matter most to founders and digital teams.
choose.title: Why choose Kalit?
choose.buildAppsDesc: End-to-end app development from a prompt
choose.deploymentDesc: Ship to production in one click
choose.endToEndDesc: From idea to live product in one platform

footer.earlyAccessDesc: Be the first to try Kalit. Enter your email for early access and product updates.
footer.trademarks: All listed company names are trademarks ™ or registered trademarks ® of their respective holders.

auth.signInDesc: Pick up where you left off across product, launch, growth, and security.
auth.signInSubtitle: Use your email or continue with Google or GitHub.
auth.registerDesc: Start building, launching, and growing with AI.
auth.name: Full name

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeBack: Welcome back to {orgName}. Check your plan, usage, jobs, and available suites.
dashboard.shortcutsDesc: Go straight to the account, billing, team, and usage controls you are most likely to need next.
dashboard.currentPlanHint: Billing, access, and execution limits stay synced here.
dashboard.jobsHint: Queued or currently running across the suite.
dashboard.seatsHint: Owners, editors, and collaborators in this workspace.
dashboard.profileDesc: Update your account details and sign-in preferences.
dashboard.billingDesc: Manage plans, subscription status, and upgrades.
dashboard.teamDesc: Review seats, roles, and workspace access.

settings.profileDesc: Manage your account details and sign-in settings.
settings.workspaceDesc: View your workspace name, website, and basic details.
settings.teamDesc: View members, roles, and seat usage.
settings.billingDesc: Manage your plan, subscription, and upgrades.

settingsPages.displayNameDesc: This is how your name appears across Kalit.
settingsPages.changePasswordDesc: Update the password you use to sign in.
settingsPages.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settingsPages.workspaceIdentityDesc: The organization record that powers billing, access, and data ownership across the Kalit suite.
settingsPages.membersDesc: Members in this workspace and current seat usage.
settingsPages.noMembersDesc: Add collaborators when you want to work together in this workspace.
settingsPages.monthlyPoolDesc: Credits used and remaining this month.
settingsPages.noUsageDesc: Usage will appear here once this workspace starts running actions.

suiteLanding.pricingDesc: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No surprises. No hidden fees.
suiteLanding.poweredByAI: Powered by leading AI models, orchestrated by Kalit

flow.heroParagraph: Powered by AI, Flow turns your ideas into fully working web projects in seconds.
flow.featuresParagraph: From idea to deployed project in minutes. No barriers between your vision and a live website.
flow.featuresTitle:
Everything you need
to ship faster
flow.howParagraph: From idea to deployed project in minutes. No barriers between your vision and a live website.
flow.step1Desc: Describe the web project you want. Be as specific or general as you like — our AI adapts to your input.
flow.step2Desc: Our AI creates a complete, working web project based on your prompt.
flow.step3Desc: Export as a ready-to-deploy package. Take full ownership of your code and host it anywhere.
flow.feat1Desc: Generate complete web projects with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — responsive and production-ready.
flow.feat2Desc: Describe your vision in natural language. Our AI interprets your intent and builds accordingly.
flow.feat3Desc: See your project live in the browser as it generates. Iterate in real time.
flow.feat4Desc: Download your project as a zip or deploy directly. Full code ownership, no lock-in.

marketing.heroParagraph: Connect your ad accounts, generate campaigns automatically, and optimize performance across platforms with AI.
marketing.featuresParagraph: Create campaigns, generate creatives, and optimize performance automatically across all your advertising platforms.
marketing.featuresTitle:
Everything you need to scale
campaigns faster
marketing.howParagraph: Connect your accounts, generate campaigns automatically, and let AI optimize performance continuously.
marketing.step1Desc: Link Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and TikTok to start managing your campaigns instantly.
marketing.step2Desc: Kalit creates visuals, headlines, audience targeting, and campaign structure automatically.
marketing.step3Desc: AI monitors results continuously and adapts campaigns to maximize conversions.
marketing.feat1Desc: Manage your Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and TikTok campaigns from a single dashboard.
marketing.feat2Desc: Our AI helps you create high-converting ad copy, images, and videos in seconds.
marketing.feat3Desc: Automatically optimize your campaign performance based on real-time data and AI-driven insights.
marketing.feat4Desc: Track your campaign performance with industry-leading analytics and reporting.

project.heroParagraph: From a single prompt, AI agents plan, build, test, and deploy your application end-to-end.
project.heroTitle:
Build full apps
from a prompt
project.featuresParagraph: Multi-agent AI builds your entire application — backend, frontend, database, and deployment.
project.howParagraph: Describe what you want, AI agents handle the rest — architecture, code, tests, and deployment.
project.step1Desc: Tell us what you want to build. The more detail, the better — but even a short prompt works.
project.step2Desc: Specialized agents handle planning, coding, design, testing, and deployment automatically.
project.step3Desc: Your app is deployed and ready. Full code access, real infrastructure, production-grade.

pentest.heroParagraph: Detect vulnerabilities before they become costly. AI scans your apps and systems, delivers actionable fixes.
pentest.featuresParagraph: Automated vulnerability detection, real-time monitoring, and actionable remediation reports.
pentest.howTitle:
From scan to fix
in minutes
pentest.howParagraph: Point Kalit at your target, let AI find the vulnerabilities, and get remediation steps instantly.
pentest.step1Desc: Enter the URL or IP of the system you want to scan. Configure scope and depth.
pentest.step2Desc: Our AI runs comprehensive security tests — OWASP Top 10, injection, XSS, misconfigurations, and more.
pentest.step3Desc: Receive a detailed report with severity ratings, evidence, and step-by-step remediation instructions.

search.heroParagraph: Discover market opportunities, analyze competitors, and validate ideas with AI-powered research.

suiteLanding.flowPlaceholder: Describe the site you want to build...
suiteLanding.flowMention: Describe it. Drop your files. Flow generates, previews, and packages your project automatically. No friction. No code. Just results.
suiteLanding.marketingPlaceholder: What would you like to create today?
suiteLanding.marketingMention: Describe your product. Kalit Marketing generates visuals, copy, targeting, and launches optimized campaigns automatically. No setup. Just results.
suiteLanding.projectPlaceholder: What do you want to build and ship today?
suiteLanding.projectMention: Describe your stack or paste a repo — Kalit provisions builds, deploys, and monitoring so you stay focused on product code.
suiteLanding.pentestPlaceholder: Describe the target or scope you want to test...
suiteLanding.pentestMention: Add context, paste URLs, or attach notes — Pentest turns it into a structured run, clear findings, and actionable fixes.
suiteLanding.flowPlaceholder1: Build me a startup landing page with pricing and FAQ...
suiteLanding.flowPlaceholder2: Create a portfolio site with dark mode and animations...
suiteLanding.flowPlaceholder3: Design a SaaS dashboard with charts and user management...
suiteLanding.flowPlaceholder4: Generate a restaurant website with menu and reservations...
suiteLanding.marketingPlaceholder1: Create a full-funnel campaign for my SaaS product launch...
suiteLanding.marketingPlaceholder2: Generate Instagram and Google Ads for my e-commerce store...
suiteLanding.marketingPlaceholder3: Build a lead generation campaign targeting B2B decision makers...
suiteLanding.marketingPlaceholder4: Design a retargeting strategy for abandoned cart users...
suiteLanding.projectPlaceholder1: Build a task management app with auth, teams, and real-time updates...
suiteLanding.projectPlaceholder2: Create a REST API with user management and Stripe billing...
suiteLanding.projectPlaceholder3: Ship a SaaS with Next.js, Prisma, and a dashboard...
suiteLanding.projectPlaceholder4: Build a marketplace with listings, reviews, and payments...
suiteLanding.pentestPlaceholder1: Scan my staging API and public web app for OWASP-style issues...
suiteLanding.pentestPlaceholder2: Run an infrastructure check on my cloud VPC and exposed services...
suiteLanding.pentestPlaceholder3: Audit my container images and CI pipeline for misconfigurations...
suiteLanding.pentestPlaceholder4: Review my SaaS signup flow and admin panel for common vulnerabilities...
suiteLanding.flowFeat1Desc: Describe your project in plain language. Our AI generates a complete, working web project instantly.
suiteLanding.flowFeat2Desc: See your project come to life in real-time with an interactive preview right in your browser.
suiteLanding.flowFeat3Desc: Export as a ready-to-deploy package. Take full ownership of your code and host it anywhere.
suiteLanding.flowFeat4Desc: Integrate Flow into your workflow. Generate projects programmatically with your API keys.
suiteLanding.projectFeat1Desc: Automatically generate APIs, authentication, database structure, and business logic for your application.
suiteLanding.projectFeat2Desc: Create advanced applications like SaaS platforms, dashboards, mobile apps, or even multiplayer games automatically.
suiteLanding.projectFeat3Desc: Deploy your application instantly and effortlessly thanks to the managed cloud infrastructure included.
suiteLanding.projectFeat4Desc: Kalit Project builds scalable infrastructure designed for real-world usage and growing applications.
suiteLanding.pentestFeat1Desc: Launch a pentest instantly on any target. Pentest identifies weaknesses and produces a structured vulnerability report.
suiteLanding.pentestFeat2Desc: Pentest continuously monitors your infrastructure and alerts you instantly when new vulnerabilities or risks appear.
suiteLanding.pentestFeat3Desc: Detect vulnerabilities before deployment. Scan your product early and fix security issues before they become critical risks.
suiteLanding.pentestFeat4Desc: Analyze competitor infrastructures and detect known weaknesses to improve your own security posture.
suiteLanding.planPro: For power users and growing teams.

contact.getInTouchDesc: Have a question, partnership inquiry, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.messageSentDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We typically respond within 24 hours.
contact.messageSentToast: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
